style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged, uneven edges, casting elongated, distorted shadows that twist like smoke around its metallic frame. Slow-moving mist particles drift upward in irregular spirals, each leaving faint afterimages, while faint energy pulses glow crimson through its glass-like body. Cold, eerie purple luminescence bathes the scene in an unsettling glow, with reflections in nearby puddles warping into distorted ghostly faces. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
